title: vitis × bacoi
intro: Vitis × bacoi, also known as the 'Thompson Seedless' grape or 'Thompson Seedless' raisin vine, is a hybrid grapevine plant derived from a cross between the Vitis vinifera and Vitis labrusca species. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits of consuming products derived from the Vitis × bacoi plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, juices, and other supplements, as well as being used to produce raisins and other food products.
